pi_items.source: Verified by matching exactly with the verbatim custom fields and tags specified in the task description instructions for the agent to create.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates dynamically by instructing the agent to create five reference tiddlers in TiddlyWiki with specific titles, custom fields, and tags. The expected_references metadata exactly mirrors the verbatim fields provided in the task description and verifier logic. As the data is created during task execution, it is appropriately marked as synthetic.
